sections.title: Base
sections.odds: 150 cards, including 50 short prints (SP). · FRAME PARALLELS: Blue, Plum, Red, Black 1/1. · ARTIST PROOF PARALLELS: Artist Proof, AP Blue, AP Masterpiece.

sections.title: Base Variations
sections.odds: FRAME PARALLELS: Blue, Plum, Red, Black 1/1. · ARTIST PROOF PARALLELS: Artist Proof, AP Blue, AP Masterpiece.

sections.title: DK Signatures
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Holo Silver #/99 or less, Holo Gold #/49 or less, Holo Blue #/25 or less, Masterpiece 1/1. · *Enyel De Los Santos only in Holo Blue/Masterpiece parallels.*

sections.title: DK Material Signatures
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Holo Blue #/25 (Dennis Santana #/5*), Purple FOTL #/10, Masterpiece 1/1. · *Enyel De Los Santos only in parallels; Nick Senzel only in Purple parallel.* · **Jeff McNeil, Byron Buxton not in Holo Blue; Byron Buxton, Clint Frazier, Larry Walker not in Purple parallel.**

sections.title: DK Jumbo Material Signatures
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Holo Blue #/25 or less, Masterpiece 1/1 (No Story*). · *Yoan Moncada only in parallels.*

sections.title: DK 205 Signatures
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Holo Silver #/99 or less, Holo Gold #/49 or less, Holo Blue #/15 or less, Purple FOTL #/10 or less, Masterpiece 1/1. · *No Kyle Tucker, Michael Kopech, Bobby Richardson in Purple parallel.*

sections.title: Retro 1983 DK Material Signatures
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Holo Blue #/25 or less, Purple FOTL #/10 or #/5, Masterpiece 1/1 (No Winfield*). · *Don Sutton, Lee Smith only in parallels.* · **Randy Johnson, Kirk Gibson, Larry Walker, Lee Smith not in Purple parallel.**

sections.title: Diamond Cuts Masterpiece
sections.odds: 30 cards. Serial numbered 1/1.

sections.title: Diamond Cuts Materials Masterpiece
sections.odds: 10 cards. Serial numbered 1/1.
